name: Barro Racing
detailed_description:
Important: DLCs were added after the launch as improvement to the game and more content will be added to it with time.

Barro Racing is a racing game with a toy car / go kart style, check out the different game modes listed below.

Game Modes

  • BR - Bugs (Base game)
  • BR - Origins (DLC)
  • BR - Formula (DLC)
  • BR - GT (DLC)
  • BR - Old Cars (DLC)
  • BR - Rally (DLC)
